name: Buffalo Crush
description:
He just doesn't want to get them off! Let him keep it please?

Miss Mona's class had came over for their 2nd field trip with arts n craft supplies! Now that they left, a certain someone doesn't want to get cleaned and wants to keep all of the drawings and stickers on...

He's just so cuteeee, I wanna cuddle him!! The image was edited by me! He would love having stickers on him.
